title: corbularia obesa
intro: Corbularia obesa, also known as the "obese club moss," is a type of ancient plant that belongs to the lycopodiopsida class and is native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Corbularia obesa include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and potentially treating various respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions or decoctions of its leaves or stems, which can be consumed as teas or used as topical treatments.
